location.name: Congo River
location.level_note: DLC location. Travel cost 50% off (10k) via DLC purchase promo. First visit 2026-04-15 AM; 5 successful PM sessions confirmed highest income in-game to date.

primary_targets: Trophy Kamba Catfish (189 lb PB / 172 lb PM session PB - highest single-fish reward in game)
Nile Perch (up to 127 lb confirmed; marked for 50-100 lb volume)
Goliath Tigerfish (Trophy 70 lb confirmed; legend says 2x these sizes)

spots.name: Cable Ferry
best_for: Moderate catfish reach with heavier casting

spots.name: Marked Nile Perch / Goliath Tigerfish spots

loadout_strategy.philosophy: Congo is a HEAVY CATFISH + APEX PREDATOR destination. The game's highest-line tackle (97 lb spinning / 93 lb casting / 88 lb X-Heavy casting) caps out here — fish that exceed ~2x the rod rating (180+ lb) effectively cannot be landed with current gear. Strategy: target volume 50-180 lb catfish + Nile Perch + Tigerfish on the strongest active rod (Nile Chasseur), while two heavy bottom anchors (Mokonzi + Tribal Totem) on the boat run baits for mid-class Kamba. Expect reel breakage even at 97 lb class — bring backup reels.
key_changes_from_am_session: Dropped Rivertex Salmonster slot from AM - low effectiveness vs big Congo cats
Added Wicked Viking 8'6" Match rod (slot 3) - heavier match power for labeo/pan volume with larger hooks
Moved Silverthorn to Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 - confirmed Nile Perch + Goliath Tigerfish MVP lure this session
Moved Nile Chasseur to Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 as well - same MVP pattern for apex predators
Switched Tribal Totem bait to Small Tilapia (live bait) - produced 172 lb Trophy Kamba; also swapped hook to Barbless #7/0
Switched Mokonzi bait to Crawfish + Hook #6/0 - pulled 100+ lb Kamba trophies reliably
Humenus (quadpod) shifted to Medium Cutbait + Monkey Skull 7 Oz + Hook #3/0 - upgraded weight for mid-river reach

slots.rod: Brutus 10'10" SE (Match, Heavy, 11-34 Lb, Mod Fast)
slots.setup_type: Float rig - tigerfish / pike / mid-class predator
slots.notes: Shiners on #6/0 hook under float = productive shore rig. Cornish Jack + Trophy Cornish Jack + Trophy African Tigerfish all caught on this combo. Titanium leader protects from pike bite-off.

slots.rod: Silverthorn Stake 7'6" (Casting, X-Heavy, 7/8-3 1/6 Oz, 35.3-88 Lb, Fast)
slots.setup_type: Casting spoon - Nile Perch / Goliath Tigerfish MVP
slots.notes: PM SESSION MVP LURE. Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 produced 9+ Nile Perch (biggest 127.194 lb!) + 2 Goliath Tigerfish (Trophy 64.9 lb). Reel breakage risk on fish >150 lb — 88 lb line is the effective ceiling here. Swapped from AM Craw 6" jig to Flat Spoon after discovering the pelagic apex-predator pattern.

slots.rod: Wicked Viking 8'6" (Match, Heavy, 28.6-83.8 Lb, Moderate) — Hellish Fighter Pack
slots.notes: Heavy match waggler rig for suspended predator fishing. Trophy Vundu 79.159 lb caught on Large Minnows under the Waggler. 83.8 lb line is above Silverthorn - useful as a second pelagic option.

slots.rod: Nile Chasseur 6'3" SE (Spinning, X-Heavy, 1/2-2 3/5 Oz, 46-97 Lb, Mod Fast) — CONGO DLC
slots.setup_type: Spinning spoon - apex predator trophy engine
slots.notes: HIGHEST-SPEC ACTIVE ROD IN GAME (97 lb class). Moved off Craw 6" jig to Flat Spoon to match the pelagic apex-predator pattern Silverthorn discovered. Even this rod will break reels on fish >180 lb — the ceiling for current tackle.

slots.rod: Humenus 11'1" (Hell's Bell, Bottom, X-Heavy, 37.5-72.7 Lb, Moderate)
slots.setup_type: Bottom rig - quadpod mid-class cat anchor
slots.notes: Quadpod anchor. Weight upgraded from 6 Oz Sinker to Monkey Skull 7 Oz for farther mid-river reach. Hook #3/0 downsized for faster bite on Big Eye Catfish volume.

slots.rod: Mokonzi 12'10" SE (Feeder, X-Heavy, 6-9 7/8 Oz, 39.7-81.6 Lb, Moderate) — Club-Series Simple Bell
slots.terminal_tackle: Rusty Cage Feeder 5 2/3 Oz + Mix Grand Fish Feeder, Hook #6/0
slots.notes: Crawfish swapped in from Cheese — reliable 100+ lb Kamba producer. Hook #6/0 for firmer trophy-cat hook-ups. Feeder still delivers groundbait attractor for sustained bite.

slots.rod: Tribal Totem 12'10" (Hell's Bell, Bottom, X-Heavy, 39.7-81.6 Lb, Moderate)
slots.terminal_tackle: Monkey Skull Sinker 7 Oz, Barbless Hook #7/0
target_fish: Trophy Kamba Catfish (172.3 lb PM / 189 lb AM)
slots.notes: TROPHY ENGINE — unchanged role from AM but swapped to live-bait Small Tilapia + Barbless Hook #7/0. Produced Trophy Kamba 172.324 lb this session. Barbless chosen for game/species conservation or release mechanics. Small Tilapia is the PM meta — use any moderate-size tilapia caught in the keeper if Small Tilapia runs out.

baits_to_buy: Buffalo Kidneys - Trophy Sharptooth/Vundu/Kamba bait (CAUTION: x20 DLC qty runs out fast)
Small Tilapia - Trophy Kamba live bait (catch extras and hold in keeper)
Shiners - Tigerfish / Cornish Jack float rig
Crawfish - 100+ lb Kamba on Mokonzi feeder
African Giant Water Bug - Trophy Kamba producer (189 lb fish AM, x20 DLC qty)
Chicken Liver - 126 lb Trophy Kamba confirmed
Large Cutbait / Medium Cutbait - mid-class Kamba volume
Large Minnows - Trophy Vundu on match waggler
Leeches - Vundu / Big Eye Catfish evening bite
Wax Worms / Bloodworms / Red Worms / Maggots - panfish volume
lures_to_consider: Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 — MVP for Nile Perch + Goliath Tigerfish on casting/spinning (stock multiple)
Craw 6" (already have) - still useful for Nile Chasseur big-cat jigging
Bionic Slug 4.7" - Salmonster bycatch if needed
tackle_to_buy: BACKUP REELS - breakage is constant even at 97 lb class. Extra GiantSpin 9000 SE + Vampire's Bane 7500 reserves essential.
Extra Monkey Skull Sinkers 7 Oz - three rods now run them
Spare Titanium Leaders .018" / .0193" - line/leader wear accelerated by monster cat fights
shopping_list.bait_management_warning: DLC-specific baits (Buffalo Kidneys, African Giant Water Bug, etc.) typically ship in x20 packs only. At current catch rate, these burn in 1-2 sessions. Market re-stocks exist at current level. Plan 1-2 shopping stops per PM session to avoid bait outage.

pm_session_learnings_4_15: 5 sessions, 5 filled keepnets — highest income rate in game (509k credits / 227k XP / +5 levels in one evening)
Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 on Silverthorn + Nile Chasseur = Nile Perch/Goliath Tigerfish MVP
Small Tilapia live bait on Tribal Totem = 172 lb Trophy Kamba producer
Buffalo Kidneys = trophy-tier bait for Kamba/Vundu/Sharptooth (stock before trips)
Reel breakage even at 97 lb spinning / 88 lb casting — keep backup reels in inventory
Fish >~2x rod rating (180+ lb) cannot be landed — drag pulls 100→0 in ~90 seconds at full tension
DLC baits ship in x20 quantities → plan market stops
income_priorities: Trophy Kamba Catfish = highest single-fish reward in game (172-189 lb class)
Nile Perch 100+ lb = major XP + credit multipliers (new species unlock this session)
Goliath Tigerfish Trophy = premium predator reward
Volume mid-class Kamba (50-100 lb) on live bait / Buffalo Kidneys
Young Nile Perch (40-86 lb) on Flat Spoon = sustained action volume
missions_completed: Novice Potamologist of the Congo River (PM trip 4)

critical_warnings: REEL BREAKAGE RISK HIGH — even Nile Chasseur 97 lb class broke reels on multiple PM catches. Carry backup reels.
LINE-RATING CEILING ~180 lb fish — anything heavier will spool the reel 100→0 in ~90 sec regardless of tension/technique. No finesse will save it.
DLC BAIT QTY IS x20 PER PACK — plan market stops; Buffalo Kidneys/African Giant Water Bug deplete fast
Silverthorn (88 lb) broke reel during PM trophy runs — keep it on Nile Perch / mid-class predators, not monster Kamba
Travel cost 20k normal / 10k DLC discount — 10 days remaining on discount window

open_research_question.question: How do higher-level players fish the upper-end Congo monsters (Nile Perch 150+ lb, Goliath Tigerfish 150+ lb, Kamba 300 lb) when the game's best market tackle caps at 93 lb casting / 97 lb spinning?
working_hypotheses: Premium competition-only tackle (check Sport/Clubs tabs for unlocks)
Specific DLC bundles beyond the Nile Chasseur pack (check Shop filters for Expert-tier rods)
Tournament rewards (some premium rods unlock only after placing in Congo competitions)
Technique-heavy drag cycling (rest → reel → rest) during fatigue phases — user's attempt failed but may need precise timing
Line upgrades outside the standard rod/reel market (specialty braid classes)
action_items: Check Sport / Club section for premium rod unlocks
Participate in Congo competitions tomorrow — tournament tier tackle may be rewarded
Check wiki.fishingplanet.com for Congo Expert-tier equipment pages
Look for post-Level 50 rod/reel tier if any exists

loadout_progress.improvement_summary: Field-tested across 6 sessions 2026-04-15. PM loadout (this version) = 7 slots, all deployed, best income rate in game. Flat Spoon 1 1/2 Oz #6/0 added as the apex-predator MVP lure. Small Tilapia live bait replaces Large Cutbait on Tribal Totem trophy anchor.

trophies_highlight: Trophy Vundu Catfish 82.197 lb + 79.159 lb + 69.979 lb
challenges_completed: Novice Potamologist of the Congo River

overall_analysis.user_verdict: HIGHEST INCOME IN GAME TO DATE. Congo River is the new top income destination, displacing Saint-Croix at this level tier. 6 sessions in one day = 7 levels + 857k credits. Plan: competitions tomorrow, back to Congo afterwards. DLC discount 10 days remaining — amortize hard while active.
